name: coplr3e4_steps600
hypothesis: the format plateau means the coproduct key->value binding (W_q/W_k/W_v) is under-trained relative to the memory state; doubling lr_coproduct 1.5e-4->3e-4 while holding the stable lr_memory 2.5e-4 targets the retrieval mechanism directly — distinct from the three failed axes (retention-up, LR-up, capacity-up) and should lift tokacc past 0.30 if binding is the bottleneck.
